summary: Tested Employee Portal features including login, dashboard, all 7 menu items (Orders, Customers, Blogs, AI Studio, Analytics, Landing Pages, Consultations), back buttons, and permission enforcement. Fixed EmployeeLandingPages.js API endpoint from /api/landing-pages to /api/landing-pages/admin/all. All backend tests pass (15/15). All UI tests pass.

issues: Console warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop - minor React warning

critical_code_review_comments: OrderSuccessPage.js correctly includes: Meta Pixel fbq('track', 'Purchase'), Google Ads gtag conversion, and backend /api/track-action with action=order_complete
LandingOrderSuccess.js correctly includes: Meta Pixel fbq('track', 'Purchase') and Google Ads gtag conversion

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all employee pages load with back buttons)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Portal is fully functional. All 7 menu items work (Orders, Customers, Blogs, AI Studio, Analytics, Landing Pages, Consultations). Back buttons exist on all pages. Permission enforcement works correctly - orderteam user gets 403 on analytics but can access orders/customers. Purchase tracking code verified in OrderSuccessPage.js and LandingOrderSuccess.js.

test_results.employee_orders_page: PASS - Loads with back button, shows 25 orders
test_results.employee_blogs_page: PASS - Loads with back button, shows blog list
test_results.employee_analytics_page: PASS - Loads with back button, shows conversion funnel
test_results.employee_landing_pages: PASS - Loads with back button, shows 34 SEO pages
test_results.employee_consultations: PASS - Loads with back button, shows 14 consultations
test_results.dashboard_menu_items: PASS - All 7 menu items visible (Orders, Customers, Blogs, AI Studio, Analytics, Landing Pages, Consultations)
test_results.purchase_tracking_code: VERIFIED - OrderSuccessPage.js has fbq Purchase, gtag conversion, and backend track-action
test_results.landing_purchase_tracking: VERIFIED - LandingOrderSuccess.js has fbq Purchase and gtag conversion

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Frontend was calling /api/landing-pages but correct endpoint is /api/landing-pages/admin/all
